summary: Machine-readable map of the aggregate check graph. Each node names the claim lane it can support; no node proves unrelated PR, CI, review-thread, tracker, or merge state.

nodes.proves: local Node runtime satisfies the package engine contract before broader gates run
configured lint rules pass for source and scripts
markdown and documentation lint rules pass
lifecycle metadata and manifest contracts pass
root archive link references remain intact
operator instructions link to the canonical glossary surface
repeated-steering contract remains wired into docs and validators
repo skill contracts validate
workflow metadata and contracts validate
evidence references in research surfaces validate
architecture dependency, diagram, and registry rules pass

changed production source respects size limits or owned ratchets
changed tests avoid self-affirming patterns
behavior-test quality gate passes
git environment sanitizer quality gate passes
harness audit tracking contracts pass
tests related to changed files pass
